murals.title: Torreblanca Mural
murals.technique: Acrylic and spray paint on wall
murals.description: A large-scale abstract graffiti mural developed from the identity of the space, combining colour, movement and structural rhythm.
murals.alt: Hize mural in Spain combining graffiti and abstract shapes

murals.title: Abstract Interior Mural
murals.technique: Acrylic and spray paint on wall
murals.description: A site-specific interior mural using abstract graffiti forms to create movement and atmosphere across the wall.
murals.alt: Hize abstract mural with colorful graffiti shapes in an interior space

murals.title: Futursat Mural
murals.technique: Spray paint and acrylic on wall
murals.description: A commissioned mural project blending Hize's graffiti roots with a clean visual intervention for a contemporary space.
murals.alt: Hize large scale abstract graffiti mural for a commissioned space

murals.title: Puerto Visual Intervention
murals.technique: Spray paint and acrylic on wall
murals.description: A visual intervention with layered colour and kinetic abstract forms for an architectural environment.
murals.alt: Hize mural with abstract graffiti shapes in a contemporary space
